---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for AgentSave
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use case

Describe the specific scenario where this feature would help. What are you trying
to accomplish? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed solution

If you have a specific implementation in mind, describe it here. Code sketches
welcome.

## Alternatives considered

What alternatives have you tried or considered? Why are they insufficient?

## Additional context

Any additional context, screenshots, or examples that would help clarify the
feature request.
